business.headline: World Bank raises India growth forecast to 6.6% for 2026-27 from 6.3% earlierEven as growth across the region slows, India continues to stand out as the main engine, providing a sense of stability at a time when the broader economic outlook remains uncertain.

Trump warns of 50% tariffs on countries supplying weapons to IranThe statement comes at a time when global geopolitical risks are already high, especially in West Asia. Any move to impose such tariffs could have wider implications for global trade and diplomatic ties.

Borrowing to survive, facing abuse: How India's credit boom is turning stressfulNearly 4 in 10 borrowers report abusive recovery calls, as a new survey highlights rising repayment stress and growing dependence on credit for everyday needs.

Dalal Street adds Rs 17 lakh crore as Iran-US ceasefire boosts marketsInvestor wealth surged by around Rs 17.1 lakh crore in a single session, taking total BSE market capitalisation to Rs 445.8 lakh crore. The S&P BSE Sensex rallied 2,946.32 points to end at 77,562.90, while the NSE Nifty50 jumped 873.35 points to close at 23,997.35.

Resilient, safe, strong: RBI assures banking system safe amid recent jittersRBI Governor highlighted that the broader banking system remains stable despite global challenges. He said there are no systemic risks to the profitability or health of banks, even as global uncertainty remains due to the West Asia conflict.

Why did RBI keep repo rate unchanged at 5.25%? Know these 5 reasonsNo change in the repo rate this time, but the move is far from random. The RBI has carefully weighed multiple factors before deciding to hold at 5.25%. Here are five reasons behind the decision.

Bitcoin above $70,000, altcoins surge up to 23%: Is a new crypto rally starting?The crypto market is showing fresh signs of strength. Bitcoin has reclaimed the $70,000 level, and altcoins are posting strong gains, leaving investors wondering if this momentum can sustain in the coming weeks.

Sensex, Nifty jump, but IT stocks trade flat. Will they perform post Q4 results?The market rally was broad-based, with strong gains across banking, financial, auto and other sectors. However, IT stocks stood out as the only laggards, trading flat or with marginal gains despite the sharp market rise.

Gold up Rs 5,000, silver jumps Rs 14,000: Will the rally continue?Precious metals are glittering again. In a short span, gold prices have risen by Rs 5,000 and silver has surged Rs 14,000, prompting fresh interest from investors trying to decode whether this momentum will continue.

What is RBI's plan after rupee's recent fall vs US dollar? RBI Governor explainsRBI's focus will remain on managing sharp swings in the currency rather than controlling its direction, as global factors continue to drive movements in the rupee.

RBI keeps repo rate unchanged at 5.25%: How it impacts your EMI and home loan plansIn a welcome move for homebuyers, the RBI has kept the repo rate unchanged at 5.25%. This means no immediate increase in EMIs, offering much-needed relief and stability to borrowers planning their finances.

Elevated energy prices, disruptions at Hormuz likely to impact growth: RBI GuvThe warning comes even as the central bank projects India's economy to grow 6.9% this financial year, signalling that while the growth engine is intact, fresh global shocks are building.

Gold at Rs 1.53 lakh, silver jumps 5%: Why are prices rising today?The rise in precious metals comes alongside a broader rally in equities and a sharp fall in crude oil prices, as investors adjust to changing risk conditions.

RBI keeps key lending rates unchanged at 5.25%, stance remains 'neutral'The Reserve Bank of India has kept its key policy rate unchanged at 5.25%, marking no change since December 2025, as policymakers chose to wait amid rising global uncertainty linked to the West Asia conflict.

Adani moves US court seeking dismissal of SEC fraud case, says lawsuit lacks jurisdictionIn a pre-motion letter filed ahead of a planned April 30 motion seeking dismissal of the lawsuit, Adanis through their lawyers said the SEC's claims over a 2021 bond sale by the group's renewable energy arm, Adani Green Energy Ltd (AGEL) are legally flawed on multiple grounds.
IndiGo shares rally 10%: Why is the stock up today?As of 9:50 am, IndiGo shares were trading at Rs 4,681.50, up 9.68% on the Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE).

Iran-US announce ceasefire: How will it impact RBI MPC decision today?RBI MPC: The ceasefire between the US and Iran, which has led to a sharp fall in crude oil prices, is expected to play a key role in shaping the RBI's stance. Lower oil prices ease pressure on inflation and the overall economy, giving the central bank more room to maintain stability.

entertainment.headline: Samay Raina's Still Alive and question India won't answer: Why can't we take a joke? Samay Raina's Still Alive goes beyond comedy to question India's uneasy relationship with humour after the India's Got Latent controversy. As outrage, censorship and shifting boundaries collide, the bigger question remains: are we really ready to laugh without limits?

Back to the Future's Michael J Fox addresses death rumours Michael J Fox has clarified rumours about his death and is reported to be in good health. The 64-year-old continues to advocate for Parkinson's research while making a notable return to television in the series, Shrinking.

Nikki Glaser says she's ok with boyfriend having sex with others, calls it foreplay Actor-comedian Nikki Glaser opened up about her unconventional relationship with boyfriend Chris Convy. She's fine with physical freedom, but draws a firm line at emotional cheating.

BTS go rogue with Hooligan music video: A throwback to their 'Dark & Wild' era BTS return with Hooligan, a dark, rap-driven anthem from their reunion album ARIRANG. The dystopian music video marks a bold shift, revisiting their Dark & Wild era with themes of power, rebellion and legacy.

NTRNeel update: No delay in Jr NTR and Prashanth Neel's film, claim makers The makers of NTRNeel clarified the misinformation about the film's schedule cancellation. The film is co-produced by Mythri Movie Makers and NTR Arts.

Pawan Kalyan's wife recalls son's Singapore fire scare, probe still on Actor Pawan Kalyan's wife Anna Lezhneva marks one year of son Mark's fire accident in Singapore, calling it his "second birthday", while also celebrating Akira Nandan's 22nd birthday.

Anurag Kashyap on casting Mrunal Thakur: I have something crazy for her in mind Filmmaker Anurag Kashyap has hinted at a bold, unconventional role for actor Mrunal Thakur in an exclusive interview. He also reflected on her standout performances, saying Thakur often underestimates her own abilities.

Cocktail 2 gets messy: Bipasha Basu's repost fuels Shahid Kapoor drama Cocktail 2 brews more than just on-screen chemistry! From Shahid Kapoor's alleged screen-time worries to Bipasha Basu's viral repost, this Bollywood buzz is serving drama, gossip, and a whole lot of masala.

We pitched Dacoit to Anurag Kashyap at Sobhita Dhulipala's wedding, says Adivi Sesh Adivi Sesh shared a fascinating behind-the-scenes anecdote about his upcoming film, Dacoit. The actor revealed that the project was actually pitched to filmmaker Anurag Kashyap in the middle of the celebrations at Sobhita Dhulipala's wedding.

No love notes for Sanya Malhotra and Rishab Rikhiram Sharma anymore? After a year of hush-hush romance, Sanya Malhotra and Rishab Rikhiram Sharma have reportedly broken up. Wondering the reason? Here's everything you need to know about their quiet breakup.

Allu Arjun's 44th birthday draws crowds and fireworks. Watch videos Pushpa star Allu Arjun's fans gathered in huge numbers outside his home to wish him on his 44th birthday. The actor stepped out to massive cheers, fireworks and more as he greeted them.

The Devil Wears Prada 2 final trailer: Anne Hathaway, Meryl Streep in new crisis The trailer for The Devil Wears Prada 2 shows Anne Hathaway and Meryl Streep's reunion for a new crisis. The upcoming film brings back the original stars and introduces new faces.

general news.headline: NDA, INDIA bloc in battle for power as voting begins in Assam, Kerala, Puducherry Live UpdatesPolling is underway in Assam, Kerala and Puducherry in high-stakes Assembly elections that will test the NDA's hold in Assam and Puducherry, and gauge the INDIA bloc's bid to stage a comeback in these regions.

Iran sets $1 per barrel crypto toll on tankers transiting via Strait of Hormuz: FTUnder the proposed system, tankers would be required to share cargo details via email. Authorities would then calculate a toll -- set at $1 per barrel -- to be paid in digital currencies such as bitcoin. Hosseini noted that vessels would be given only a short window to complete payment.

I killed Kruthika, say we're just friends: Chilling chats surface in doctor murderPolice have uncovered alleged confession-like messages and instructions to mislead authorities in the murder of Bengaluru doctor Kruthika Reddy, with digital evidence pointing to a calculated cover-up by her husband. A sessions court has denied the accused bail, citing the strength of the evidence.

Iran shuts Hormuz after 100 missiles from Israel hit Lebanon in minutesIran closed the Strait of Hormuz, less than 24 hours after US President Donald Trump announced a two-week ceasefire. Tehran accused Israel of violating the ceasefire with deadly strikes on Hezbollah targets in Lebanon.

The nuclear stunner India pulled off; US, France invested billions but failedIndia achieved stunning success at the Kalpakkam nuclear plant, which even the US and France failed to. Only Russia has a commercially running Fast Breeder Reactor (FBR). The Kalpakkam FBR will use India's huge reserves of Thorium to power millions of households, and reduce the country's energy imports.

Wasn't there when we needed them: Trump rebukes NATO after talks with Mark RutteFollowing the two-hour meeting, Rutte acknowledged strains within the alliance, describing the exchange as candid but constructive, even as divisions over the conflict with Iran came into clearer focus.

100 strikes in 10 mins: Why Lebanon faces biggest Israel attack despite ceasefireIsrael launched over 100 strikes across Lebanon within minutes despite a US-Iran ceasefire, killing over 250 people. Iran says Lebanon was part of the deal, but Israel and US deny it.

Identity of Satoshi Nakamoto revealed? New report says Bitcoin creator is…Who is Satoshi Nakamoto, the person who created Bitcoin? This has been one of the biggest mysteries in the crypto and tech world. Now, a new report suggests that all clues lead to a British technologist even though the person has denied it again and again.

JD Vance to lead team for peace talks with Iran in Pak, 1st round on April 11Trump sends a Vance-led team to Pakistan for US-Iran talks starting Saturday, as Washington rejects earlier Iranian proposals but signals progress after a revised plan aligned with US demands.

Live: 250 killed in Lebanon in Israeli strikes after US-Iran agree ceasefireUS-Israel-Iran War Live Updates: The Middle East slipped back into instability as Lebanon witnessed some of the heaviest attack by Israel despite a two-week truce with US, with over 100 people killed and around 700 injured. Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu made it clear that Lebanon is not part of the agreement; even as the United States and Iran announced a pause in attacks, fresh strikes were reported across Iran, the UAE, Kuwait and Bahrain, raising serious doubts over the truce's durability, while US President Donald Trump said the ceasefire — brokered with Pakistan's involvement — includes Tehran allowing safe transit through the Strait of Hormuz, with talks scheduled in Islamabad on Friday to decide the next steps. Iran has claimed victory but stressed that the upcoming negotiations do not signal the end of the war. Trump indicated possible sanctions and tariff relief for Tehran while reiterating that Iran will not be allowed to enrich uranium and warning of steep tariffs on countries supplying weapons to Iran, even as oil prices eased following the announcement, with Brent crude slipping below $95 a barrel. Catch all the live updates at Indiatoday.in.

Costly call is IPL 2026 Play of the Day in DelhiIPL 2026, DC vs GT: In a contest that swung both ways till the very end, David Miller looked set to take Delhi Capitals home after doing the heavy lifting, only for a momentary lapse to undo all his work, as Gujarat Titans edged out a win by the narrowest of margins to get off the mark on Wednesday.

Hezbollah not part of ceasefire deal: Netanyahu vows to continue strikes in LebanonThe Israeli military said it targeted over 100 Hezbollah command centres and military sites across Beirut, the Bekaa Valley, and southern Lebanon. Lebanon's health ministry reported 112 deaths and 837 injuries.

Live: Kerala CM Pinarayi Vijayan casts vote, Assam's Himanta Sarma offers prayersAssembly Election 2026 Live Updates: Voting is currently underway for the high-stakes Assembly elections in Assam, Kerala and Puducherry, and as well as for the by-polls in Nagaland, Karnataka and Tripura. Polling commenced at 7 am and will end at 6 pm, according to the Election Commission. In Assam, 722 candidates will battle it out for the 126-member Assembly. The contest largely centres on CM Himanta Biswa Sarma's governance record versus the Congress campaign led by Gaurav Gogoi. Kerala sees 2.71 crore voters eligible to vote across 140 constituencies, with 883 candidates contesting. While the race is triangular, it remains primarily a battle between the ruling Left Democratic Front led by CM Pinarayi Vijayan, and the opposition United Democratic Front. In Puducherry, around 9.5 lakh voters will decide the fate of 294 candidates across 30 seats. The NDA alliance is aiming to retain power in the Union Territory, while the INDIA bloc is mounting a strong challenge.

The messenger or the mediator? Deconstructing Pak's role in US-Iran ceasefireTo understand why Pakistan found itself at the centre of this geopolitical manoeuvring, one must look at the historical architecture of its bilateral relationship with Iran. Aparna Pande, senior fellow at the Hudson Institute in Washington, DC, notes that shared geography and demographics afford Islamabad a unique utility.

Middle East on fire again: A bilateral ceasefire in multilateral war falls apartHours after the ceasefire between the US and Iran was announced, several airstrikes have been reported from the Middle East. From Iran to the UAE to Kuwait, Bahrain, Saudi Arabia, several energy sites are in flames. A bilateral ceasefire cannot help in a multilateral war.

'Ketamine Queen' gets 15 years in prison over death of 'Friends' star Matthew PerryJayvee Sangha, 42, pleaded guilty to multiple drug-related charges, including distributing ketamine that resulted in death. She admitted to operating a "stash house" for narcotics out of her home in North Hollywood, Los Angeles.

Iran accuses US of violating 3 clauses, calls ceasefire talks unreasonableIran calls US talks unreasonable after alleging ceasefire breaches, as tensions rise with Israel continuing strikes and both sides clash over terms ahead of planned negotiations in Pakistan.

I am a plastic surgeon and my work goes beyond 'nose job' and 'boob job'Plastic surgery is misunderstood and reduced to jokes about "nose jobs" or "boob jobs." But plastic surgeons rebuild faces after cancer, restore limbs after accidents, release burn scars, and help children born with defects live normal lives.

I stopped using Blinkit and Instamart for 30 days. My wallet (and health) thanked meI deleted Blinkit and Instamart from my phone just to see if I could survive in this digital-first world. It seems, I thrived.

sports.headline: Rashid Khan may step away from Test cricket, doubtful for India clash in June Advised by doctors to avoid red-ball cricket after back surgery, Rashid Khan is set to prioritise white-ball formats. The Gujarat Titans spinner all but confirmed his withdrawal from the June Test against India in New Chandigarh.

Miller not at fault: Gavaskar defends DC star's no-single call in 1-run loss Sunil Gavaskar defended David Miller's call not to take a single during the final over of the DC vs GT game. Miller refused to give Kuldeep Yadav strike in the penultimate ball of the final over as DC lost by 1 run.

Vaishali beats Divya to share lead with Jiner Zhu in Candidates Chess India's R Vaishali remained in contention for the Candidates title after beating compatriot Divya Deshmukh in Round 9 on Wednesday, moving into a joint lead with China's Jiner Zhu.

Rashid Khan was the hero for the visiting team, which managed to open its account in the new season on Wednesday.

Billie Jean King Cup: Vaishnavi, Sahaja power India to 3-0 sweep over New Zealand Young debutant Vaishnavi Adkar and Sahaja Yamalapalli secured decisive victories as India bounced back to blank New Zealand 3-0 in their second Asia/Oceania Group I tie of the Billie Jean King Cup on Wednesday.

Mohammed Shami devising new variations with Bharat Arun to outfox IPL batters Mohammed Shami outfoxed Abhishek Sharma with a new delivery he had developed just days earlier while working with bowling coach Bharat Arun, Lucknow Super Giants spin bowling coach Carl Crowe revealed.

Cameron Green set to make his bowling return during KKR vs LSG clash in Kolkata Cameron Green is all set to make his bowling return in the IPL during the KKR vs LSG clash at the Eden Gardens on Thursday, April 9. Green is yet to bowl in the IPL this season in three matches so far as he has failed to justify his price tag so far.

Doha Diamond League postponed until June due to West Asia tensions The opening round of the Diamond League season, scheduled to be held in Doha on May 8, has been postponed to June 19 due to the ongoing conflict in the Gulf, organisers said on Wednesday.

Will Narine and Varun return for LSG clash? KKR sweat over key duo's fitnessKKR have issued an update on Sunil Narine and Varun Chakravarthy after the spin duo missed the last clash against Punjab Kings in Kolkata. Narine and Chakravarthy lead KKR's spin attack this season.

Medvedev, visibly rattled throughout the contest, smashed his racquet multiple times in frustration.

DC vs GT Highlights: Rahul, Miller heroics in vain as Gujarat win thrillerDelhi Capitals (DC) vs Gujarat Titans (GT) Highlights, IPL 2026: KL Rahul's 92 and heroics from David Miller go in vain as GT secure their first win of the season. Despite Bayern's dominance and missed chances, Madrid remain firmly in the tie ahead of the second leg in Munich.

But when it came to MI, the approach seemed to lack the intent needed to pull off a big chase.

HD Throwback: Why Vaibhav Sooryavanshi vs Bumrah felt like Sachin vs QadirIPL 2026: 37 years after Sachin Tendulkar's sixes against Abdul Qadir in Peshawar, history finds a high-definition mirror in Guwahati.
